summary: Comprehensive testing of Mentor Dashboard and Finance Withdrawals feature. All 19 backend API tests passed. All frontend UI tests passed including Edwin's master_of_academics view (Individual/Team toggle, Team Override commission) and Ashwin's regular mentor view (no toggle, no team override). Finance withdrawals page fully functional with withdrawal recording verified end-to-end.
passed_tests: Backend: Edwin (master_of_academics) can access /api/mentor/dashboard with individual view
Backend: Edwin can access /api/mentor/dashboard?view_mode=team with team data
Backend: Edwin has team_override_aed commission (0.5% of team net)
Backend: Bonus slab structure returns 5 slabs ($10K=10%, $20K=15%, $30K=17.5%, $40K=20%, $50K=25%)
Backend: /api/mentor/dashboard/monthly-trend returns monthly deposit/withdrawal data
Backend: /api/mentor/dashboard/leaderboard returns ranked mentors by net revenue
Backend: /api/mentor/dashboard/revenue-chart returns deposits by mentor
Backend: Ashwin (regular mentor) gets individual view only (effective_view=individual)
Backend: Regular mentor has team_override_aed=0
Backend: Regular mentor has 1% net commission (not 1.5%)
Backend: Period filters work (this_month, this_quarter, this_year, overall)
Backend: Finance user can access /api/finance/mentor-student-deposits
Backend: Finance user can access /api/finance/mentor-withdrawals
Backend: Mentor gets 403 when accessing /api/finance/mentor-student-deposits
Backend: Mentor gets 403 when trying to POST /api/finance/mentor-withdrawal
Backend: Finance role gets 403 when accessing /api/mentor/dashboard
Frontend: Edwin sees Individual/Team toggle on Mentor Dashboard
Frontend: Edwin sees Team Override (0.5% team net) in Commission Breakdown
Frontend: Edwin sees Net Commission (1.5% of net) for master role
Frontend: Edwin sees 'Team overview — click charts to drill down' hint text
Frontend: Ashwin (regular mentor) does NOT see Individual/Team toggle
Frontend: Ashwin does NOT see Team Override commission line
Frontend: Ashwin sees Net Commission (1% of net) - correct for regular mentor
Frontend: Ashwin sees 'Welcome back, Ashwin' personalized greeting
Frontend: Finance Withdrawals page loads with summary cards
Frontend: Student Deposits tab shows 142 students with Withdraw buttons
Frontend: Withdrawal History tab shows recent withdrawals
Frontend: Withdrawal modal opens with student info (Deposits/Withdrawn/Net badges)
Frontend: Recording withdrawal works - toast shows 'Withdrawal of $75 recorded'
Frontend: New withdrawal appears in history after submission
Frontend: Period filter changes dashboard data (Overall vs Quarter showed different values)
critical_code_review_comments: Commission calculation correctly implemented: 1% flat on deposits, 1% net for regular mentors, 1.5% net for Edwin, 0.5% team override for Edwin
Role-based view logic correct: canToggleView = isMaster || isAdmin
Team Override commission line correctly hidden for non-master roles using isMaster && conditional rendering
Bonus slabs correctly display 5 indicators at bottom with highlighting for achieved slabs
Finance endpoints properly secured with require_roles(['super_admin', 'admin', 'finance'])
data-testid attributes present on all key interactive elements
seed_data_creation: Created one test withdrawal of $75 for 'Muhammed shereef cholayil' with notes 'Playwright test withdrawal' during testing. This appears in the withdrawal history.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mentor Dashboard feature fully tested. Key features: 1) Edwin (master_of_academics) sees Individual/Team toggle, Team Override commission (0.5%), Net commission shows 1.5%. 2) Regular mentors (like Ashwin) see individual data only, no toggle, no team override, Net commission is 1%. 3) Finance Withdrawals page at /finance/mentor-withdrawals allows finance role to record student withdrawals. 4) Both dashboards have period filters (This Month, This Quarter, This Year, Overall). 5) Bonus Progress shows current month net deposits in USD with 5 slab indicators.
testing_method: Backend pytest (19 tests) + Playwright browser automation for frontend verification

roles.master_of_academics: Team view with Individual/Team toggle, Team Override commission, drill-down hints
roles.mentor: Individual view only, no toggle, no team override, 1% net commission

components: Student Deposits tab with Withdraw buttons
